title: Match queries lack date range/season filtering on match result tools
evidence: src/mcp.rs:57-62 — matches_between tool has no season or date_range parameter; team_stats (mcp.rs:63) supports season but returns stats not match lists; queries.rs:59 has matches_by_competition_season but it is not exposed as MCP tool
suggestion: Add season/date_from/date_to parameters to matches_between tool, or expose a find_matches tool with date/season filters

title: Match queries lack competition filtering on match search tools
evidence: src/mcp.rs:57-62 — matches_between has no competition param; queries.rs:59-69 matches_by_competition_season exists internally but is not exposed as MCP tool; standings/avg_goals/home_win_rate support competition but return aggregate stats not match lists
suggestion: Add competition parameter to matches_between or expose matches_by_competition_season as a dedicated MCP tool

title: Clippy warning: to_string applied to Display type in writeln! args
evidence: clippy_output.txt — src/main.rs:30:33 warning: to_string applied to a type that implements Display in writeln! args
suggestion: Remove .to_string() call — writeln! uses Display trait directly
